records.v: Injury on wing, ASD done. Pododermatitis lesion on both the legs.
Very long nails, trimmed. Tip of the upper beak broken
Mild airsacculitis, yellowish fluid/fat around testicles
Small multiple nodular lesions on serosa of intestine
Separation of the oviduct to the oavary
